dataset.notes: The fixture writes Codex provider-native rollout records and state_5.sqlite thread metadata directly into the disposable real project. It does not use ccb ask, does not create jobs, and is not a live 56-turn model throughput test.

stdout_tail: 00:00 +0: server-wide local gateway lists projects and exercises chat files artifacts
00:00 +1: server-wide gateway dynamically backfills older chat on upward scroll

limitations: Does not close the full 200+ mixed Markdown/image/document/artifact history case.
Does not measure profile/release frame timings, CPU, memory, or power.
Does not validate live provider generation latency for 56 turns.
File/image upload and backend artifact download still need native selected-agent path revalidation.
